IntVectorProperty.name: ListeningPort
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Specify port on which to listen for packets

StringVectorProperty.name: MulticastAddress
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Specify multicast address on which to listen for Lidar packets. The range of multicast IPv4 addresses is from 224.0.0.0 to 239.255.255.255. Empty and non-multicast address are ignored. Leave it empty to listen in broadcast or in unicast.

StringVectorProperty.name: LocalListeningAddress
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Specify listening address in case of multiple inferface. If :: or invalid, it tries to listen to ALL/ANY local IPv6 and IPv4 address. If 0.0.0.0, it tries to listen to ALL/ANY local IPv4 address. On Unix/OSX receving broadcasted packets from only one interface needs the local broadcast receiver address (x.x.x.255) instead of the local address. Joining multicast group won't work with multiple interfaces if no specific address is entered.

StringVectorProperty.name: ForwardedIpAddress
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Specify the Ip address on which to forward all packets received by the stream

IntVectorProperty.name: ForwardedPort
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Specify port on which to forward all packets received by the stream

Property.name: Stop
Property.Documentation: Pause the current stream. Note that the stream will continue in background.
